LogisticRegression.notes: Baseline interpretable classifier. Keep grid small for low-N.

LinearDiscriminantAnalysis_svd.notes: LDA with solver=svd. shrinkage is not supported with svd.

QuadraticDiscriminantAnalysis.notes: QDA can overfit; reg_param regularizes covariance estimates.

KNeighborsClassifier.notes: Highly sensitive to scaling; evaluate with/without scaler later.

SVC_linear.notes: Margin-based baseline; probability=True for probability outputs (still assess calibration).

RandomForestClassifier.notes: Tree ensemble baseline; scaling not required.

GaussianNB.notes: Simple generative baseline; often surprisingly strong.

XGBClassifier.notes: Optional. Keep conservative to avoid overfitting and excessive tuning.

strategies.name: median
strategies.notes: Median imputation for numeric variables. Must be fit on training folds only.

strategies.name: none
strategies.notes: No scaling. Appropriate for tree-based models; still evaluate for robustness.

strategies.name: maxabs
strategies.notes: MaxAbsScaler. Included because it was used previously; compare systematically.

strategies.name: on
strategies.notes: PCA with variance retention. Fit on training folds only. Use after scaling.

strategies.name: on
strategies.notes: PCA with fixed component count (interpretability / stability check).

constraints.notes: Avoid PCA for tree-based methods by default.

strategies.name: undersample
strategies.notes: Random undersampling of majority class. Applied ONLY to training folds.

strategies.name: smote
strategies.notes: SMOTE oversampling. Applied ONLY to training folds. Use with scaling.

strategies.name: smoteenn
strategies.notes: SMOTE + ENN cleaning. More aggressive; good stress test for robustness.

notes: Resampling must be performed within the CV loop/pipeline (train folds only) to avoid leakage.
If a resampling strategy fails (e.g., too few minority samples for SMOTE), fallback_to_none to keep the run going.

seed_grid.notes: Fixed list of 100 unique seeds stored in the config to ensure exact reproducibility.

strategies.name: kfold
strategies.notes: Primary evaluation. For each seed: StratifiedKFold with shuffle=True.

strategies.name: loo
strategies.notes: Sensitivity analysis due to computational cost and potential high variance.

strategies.name: random_split_80_20
strategies.notes: Single holdout per seed; included as sensitivity analysis.

strategies.name: stratified_split_80_20
strategies.notes: Stratified holdout per seed; included as sensitivity analysis.

notes: Avoid relying on a single 80/20 split because test sets are small in low-N.
Seeds are fixed and recorded for reproducibility.
All preprocessing (imputation, scaling, PCA) and resampling must be fit/applied using training folds only.

thresholds.notes: Default threshold 0.5 for reporting. Clinical threshold selection can be performed later.
